set.disp: Message received a hit or hits
Domain Identifier supplied was not recognized by WOLF
Message length supplied is invalid (less than 1)
WOLF Message type flag specified is invalid (not 0, 1, 2 or 3)
Text format flag value is invalid (not 0 or 1)
Type of Filter Response value is invalid (not 0 or 1)
Payload has a length of less than 1
Enquiry message has failed to retrieve requested Database references
Failed to retrieve Database reference of HIT(s)
Issue with availability of WOLF server(s)
Errors sending message buffer to OFACAgent server
Error freeing the APPC converse with the OFACAgent server
